entries.title: Media health page.
entries.notes: Captured from the isolated Capell package workbench with missing-alt, stale, unused, and healthy Curator records. The table shows the three actionable records and omits the healthy record.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews media health status for stale, missing, or incomplete assets.

entries.title: Media health table.
entries.notes: Cropped from the seeded MediaHealthPage capture to prove filename, size, usage count, issue, media type, and last-used columns for three distinct health states.
entries.useCase: An administrator scans individual media health rows and remediation state.

entries.title: Curator media field inside a form.
entries.notes: Captured from the seeded Capell site edit form after MediaLibraryServiceProvider rebound MediaFieldFactory to CuratorMediaFieldFactory. The Image, Logo, and Inverted logo controls are Curator-backed Add media fields.
entries.useCase: An editor selects media through the Curator field embedded in a Capell form.

entries.title: Migration command output or report.
entries.notes: Actual --dry-run output captured from the package workbench after seeding two Spatie Media Library rows owned by the testbench admin user. The command projects two Curator rows and two owner foreign-key updates with zero warnings.
entries.useCase: A developer reviews the Spatie-to-Curator migration report before or after migration.
